title: Dungeon Delver
description: ASCII roguelike dungeon crawler — 3 classes, procedural BSP dungeons, FOV, BFS pathfinding, and full turn-based combat across 5 floors.
concept: A complete turn-based roguelike in a single HTML file. Choose Warrior, Mage, or Rogue, each with distinct stats and abilities. Descend through 5 procedurally generated floors using BSP room partitioning, fight monsters using BFS-driven AI, and loot items. The Mage fires AoE Fireballs; the Rogue backstabs for double damage. Seeds are shareable via URL hash and best scores persist in localStorage.
features: 3 character classes with distinct stats and abilities
BSP procedural dungeon generation with seeded RNG
Turn-based combat with leveling, XP, and item drops
Mage AoE Fireball spell, Rogue Backstab double damage
5 dungeon floors + boss Dragon on floor 5
Seed sharing via URL hash + best score localStorage
On-screen D-pad touch controls for mobile
Retro terminal aesthetic with glowing canvas rendering

interaction.keyboard: Arrow keys / WASD to move, YUBN for diagonals, Space/. to wait, F for Fireball (Mage), > to descend stairs, R to restart
interaction.touch: On-screen 3×3 D-pad for 8-directional movement + Fireball and Descend buttons
interaction.click: Class selection cards to start game, overlay buttons to restart or share
